steps.description: If the fibula is from the right leg, tick the "Right side leg" checkbox.

sub_operations.description: Indicate whether the fibula is from the right leg

ui_parameter_binding.ui_text: (tick if fibula is the one from the right leg)

properties.text: (tick if fibula is the one from the right leg)

sub_operations.question: Is the fibula from the right leg?

choice_info.question: Is the fibula from the right leg?

steps.description: In the "Select mandibular segmentation" section, choose the mandibular segmentation.

sub_operations.description: Select the mandibular segmentation node
sub_operations.question: Choose the mandibular segmentation

steps.description: In the "Select fibula segmentation" section, choose the fibula segmentation.

sub_operations.description: Select the fibula segmentation node
sub_operations.question: Choose the fibula segmentation

steps.description: In the "Current Scalar Volume" option, choose the Mandible Volume.

sub_operations.description: Select the mandible volume node
sub_operations.question: Choose the mandible scalar volume

steps.description: Click "Create bone models from segmentations" button.

sub_operations.description: Create bone models from segmentations

steps.description: Change the layout to "Conventional".

sub_operations.description: Change layout to Conventional

steps.description: For the R (red) slice view, toggle ON "slice visibility in 3D view": render the red 2D slice plane inside the 3D view (the slice controller's eye/visibility button that shows the slice in 3D). This is a per-slice 3D-display toggle on the slice node.

sub_operations.description: Toggle on slice visibility in 3D view for Red slice

operation_descriptions: Toggle on slice visibility in 3D view for Red slice

steps.description: For the R (red) view, toggle on "FOV, Spacing match 2D" (adjusts slice resolution to match the 2D viewport pixel spacing).

sub_operations.description: Toggle on FOV and spacing match 2D for Red slice

operation_descriptions: Toggle on FOV and spacing match 2D for Red slice

steps.description: In the toolbar, turn on "slice intersection visibility". In the slice intersection interaction options, turn on "set interaction", then enable both "Translate" and "Rotate".

sub_operations.description: Enable slice intersection visibility and interaction (Translate and Rotate)

operation_descriptions: Enable slice intersection visibility and interaction (Translate and Rotate)

steps.description: Manually adjust the slice intersection position by translate and rotate of the cross lines in each view.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust slice intersection position via translate/rotate of cross lines

ui_guidance.title: Adjust slice intersections
ui_guidance.instruction: Translate and rotate cross lines in each view.

steps.description: Click the "Add mandibular curve" button.

sub_operations.description: Add mandibular curve node and activate place mode

steps.description: Configure the display settings of the mandibular curve created by the "Add Mandibular Curve" button. Specifically, in the "Markups" module, under the "Advanced" collapsible section, select "3D View 1" and "Red" in the "View" combo box.

sub_operations.description: Configure mandibular curve display to show in 3D View 1 and Red slice

ui_guidance.title: Set curve display views
ui_guidance.instruction: Select 3D View 1 and Red in the Markups Advanced section.

operation_descriptions: Configure mandibular curve display to show in 3D View 1 and Red slice

steps.description: Manually click and draw on the "Red" view to create a curve along the mandible.

sub_operations.description: Draw mandibular curve by placing control points on Red view
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Click and draw on Red view to create a curve along the mandible

steps.placement_instructions: Click and draw on Red view to create a curve along the mandible

ui_guidance.title: Draw mandibular curve
ui_guidance.instruction: Click points along the mandible in the Red view, then click Done.

steps.description: Change the layout to "BoneReconstructionPlanner".

sub_operations.description: Change layout to BoneReconstructionPlanner

steps.description: For the R (red) slice view, toggle OFF "slice visibility in 3D view": stop rendering the red 2D slice plane inside the 3D view (the same per-slice 3D-display toggle as step 7, set off).

sub_operations.description: Toggle off slice visibility in 3D view for Red slice

operation_descriptions: Toggle off slice visibility in 3D view for Red slice

steps.description: Manually set how many cut planes you want.

sub_operations.description: Set number of cut planes
sub_operations.question: How many cut planes do you want?

choice_info.question: How many cut planes do you want?

steps.description: Click "Add cut plane" button.

sub_operations.description: Add cut plane node and activate place mode

controller.prompt: How many cut planes to place?

steps.description: Place one mandibular cut plane using the extension's Add cut plane workflow. If the user requested N cut planes, repeat the Add cut plane + place plane interaction N times.

sub_operations.description: Place one mandibular cut plane by placing control points
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Place this plane, then click Done.

steps.placement_instructions: Place this plane, then click Done.

controller.prompt: How many cut planes to place?

ui_guidance.title: Place cutting plane
ui_guidance.instruction: Position this cutting plane, then click Done.

steps.description: Click "Add fibula line" button.

sub_operations.description: Add fibula line node

steps.description: Draw a line over the fibula in "3D View 2", starting with the first point distally and the last point proximally.

sub_operations.description: Draw fibula line in 3D View 2
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Draw a line over the fibula in 3D View 2, first point distally, last point proximally.

steps.placement_instructions: Draw a line over the fibula in 3D View 2, first point distally, last point proximally.

ui_guidance.title: Draw fibula line
ui_guidance.instruction: Place first point distally, last point proximally in 3D View 2, then click Done.

steps.description: Click "Reset field of view" button in the R (red) slice view.

sub_operations.description: Reset field of view in Red slice view

operation_descriptions: Reset field of view in Red slice view

steps.description: Click "Center fibula line using fibula model" button to align the line with the anatomical axis of the fibula.

sub_operations.description: Center fibula line using fibula model

steps.description: Tick the "Automatic mandibular planes positioning for maximum bones contact area" checkbox.

sub_operations.description: Enable automatic mandibular planes positioning for maximum bone contact

ui_parameter_binding.ui_text: Automatic mandibular planes positioning for maximum bones contact area

properties.text: Automatic mandibular planes positioning for maximum bones contact area

steps.description: Tick the "Make all mandible planes rotate together" checkbox.

sub_operations.description: Enable make all mandible planes rotate together

ui_parameter_binding.ui_text: Make all mandible planes rotate together

properties.text: Make all mandible planes rotate together

steps.description: Enter the desired value in "Initial space (mm)".

sub_operations.description: Enter initial space between planes in mm
sub_operations.question: Enter initial space (mm)

steps.description: Enter the desired value in "Between space (mm)".

sub_operations.description: Enter between space between planes in mm
sub_operations.question: Enter between space (mm)

steps.description: Click "Update fibula planes over fibula line; update fibula bone pieces and transform them to mandible" to generate the reconstruction and create the fibula cut planes.

sub_operations.description: Generate fibula planes, bone pieces, and transform to mandible

steps.description: In the BoneReconstructionPlanner module, in the "Mandible planes" row, toggle on the eye-icon tool button to show the mandibular cut planes.

sub_operations.description: Show mandibular cut planes in 3D view

steps.description: In the same "Mandible planes" row, toggle on the axes-icon tool button to show the plane interaction handles.

sub_operations.description: Show mandibular plane interaction handles

steps.description: Manually adjust the mandibular cut planes in the mandible 3D view by dragging the visible plane interaction handles.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust mandibular cut plane positions using interaction handles
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Drag the visible plane interaction handles to adjust cut plane positions

steps.placement_instructions: Drag the visible plane interaction handles to adjust cut plane positions

ui_guidance.title: Adjust mandible cut planes
ui_guidance.instruction: Drag the handles to position each plane, then click Done.

steps.description: Click "Update fibula planes over fibula line; update fibula bone pieces and transform them to mandible" to regenerate the reconstruction.

sub_operations.description: Regenerate fibula planes, bone pieces, and transform after adjustments

steps.description: In the "Mandible planes" row, toggle off the eye-icon tool button to hide the mandibular cut planes.

sub_operations.description: Hide mandibular cut planes in 3D view

steps.description: Clear the "Show original mandible model" checkbox.

sub_operations.description: Clear show original mandible model checkbox

controller.prompt: How many cut planes to place?
